subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! The numerous prayers and letters regarding the schools of Hamadán and those souls who have extended assistance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مناجات و مکاتیب متعدده در حق مدارس همدان و نفوسی که باعانه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
